summary: Replayed ADR 0297 from the latest `origin/main` lineage on `codex/ws-0297-live-apply`, hardened the private hosted workflow runtime around branch-local config replay, clone relay, author identity, and shell-safe token export, and re-verified the branch-local Renovate path end to end on the private Gitea runner. The settled branch now passes the focused repo automation slice, preserves the OpenBao-rendered runner credential bundle, and completes hosted `validate.yml`, `release-bundle.yml`, and `renovate.yml` runs on the private branch snapshot, with Renovate creating the dashboard issue plus governed update PRs.

verification.check: Focused repo automation and Renovate contract validation
verification.observed: The settled branch passed `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with jinja2 pytest -q tests/test_gitea_workflows.py tests/test_renovate_automation.py tests/test_gitea_runtime_role.py` with `23 passed in 0.83s`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/validate_renovate_contract.py`, and the pinned runtime validator `npx --yes --package renovate@42.76.4 renovate-config-validator renovate.json`.

verification.check: Runner bootstrap and Renovate identity wiring
verification.observed: The branch-local evidence confirms `/opt/gitea-runner/credentials/renovate/renovate.env` exists on `docker-build-lv3`, the runner container sees `/var/run/lv3/renovate/renovate.env`, and the Gitea admin API returns the active `renovate-bot` identity after the shared OpenBao and Gitea convergence.

verification.check: Hosted branch validation on the private Gitea snapshot
verification.observed: After replaying the repaired branch into the private repo, `release-bundle.yml` run `162` and `validate.yml` run `163` on `codex/ws-0297-live-apply` both concluded `success`.

`renovate.yml` run `165` / job `219` concluded `success` on `codex/ws-0297-live-apply`, created the `Renovate Dashboard` issue (`#3`), and opened governed PRs `#1` and `#2` in the private `ops/proxmox_florin_server` repo.

notes: This branch-local receipt preserves the first settled live replay from the isolated worktree before the protected release and canonical-truth surfaces were refreshed on `main`.

The private Gitea repository is a managed internal snapshot, not a mirror of GitHub `origin`, so the branch-local hosted proof explicitly uses the pushed private branch snapshot rather than assuming GitHub changed the live repo.
